The light green box is now at cols 8-9, rows 32-33. The red bar is back to its full 6-column width at cols 12-17. So the light green box moved back to the left side, within the gray box area.

3. Maybe move the light green box through the wall to the right side?
Let me try a different approach. Let me look at the wall between the left and right panels. The wall has gaps at certain rows. Maybe the goal is to move the light green box through one of these gaps.
Looking at the ASCII, the wall is at col 28 (the white column). The gaps are at rows 17, 20, 23, 26, 29, 32, 35, 38, 41, 44, 47, 50, 53, 56, 59, 62 (every 3 rows).
The light green box is at rows 32-33, which aligns with the gap at row 32. Let me try moving the light green box to the right edge and see if it can pass through the wall.

Actually, looking at the layout, the left panel ends at col 27, and the wall is at col 28. The light green box is at cols 8-9. To reach the wall, it needs to move to cols 26-27.
Let me try moving RIGHT several times to reach the wall.

# Current position: cols 8-9, need to reach cols 26-27

</parameter>
